formulas.expr: case when [券发放数] > 0 then [券核销数] * 1.0 / [券发放数] else 0 end
formulas.name: 券核销率

formulas.expr: case when [触达人数] > 0 then [转化人数] * 1.0 / [触达人数] else 0 end
formulas.name: 总体转化率

formulas.expr: case when [总折扣]   > 0 then [拉动销售] / [总折扣] else 0 end
formulas.name: 券ROI

formulas.expr: case when [核销日期] is not null then 1 else 0 end
formulas.name: 是否核销

formulas.expr: case when [核销日期] is not null then [折扣金额] else 0 end
formulas.name: 核销折扣

formulas.expr: case when [是否查看] = 1 then 1 else 0 end
formulas.name: 查看标志

actions.name: 触达 第一层(活动ID×会员ID)
触达 第二层粒度滚回
触达+订单7天窗口
actions.sql:
SELECT
  t.`活动ID`,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.`会员ID`) AS `转化人数`,
  SUM(o.`实付金额`) AS `拉动销售`
FROM input1 t
JOIN input2 o ON t.`会员ID` = o.`会员ID`
  AND DATEDIFF(o.`业务日期`, t.`触达日期`) BETWEEN 0 AND 7
  AND o.`订单状态` = '已完成'
WHERE t.`活动ID` IS NOT NULL AND t.`活动ID` <> ''
GROUP BY t.`活动ID`
